classes.name: Organization
classes.label: Organization
classes.description: A formal entity such as a company, agency, or institution.

classes.name: Product
classes.label: Product
classes.description: A good or service that is produced or offered for sale.

classes.name: Publication
classes.label: Publication
classes.description: A work that has been published.

object_properties.name: partnership
object_properties.label: Partnership
object_properties.description: Indicates a formal agreement or collaboration between two organizations.

object_properties.name: ownedBy
object_properties.label: Owned By
object_properties.description: Indicates the parent organization that owns another organization.

object_properties.name: authorOf
object_properties.label: Author Of
object_properties.description: Indicates a person who has written or authored a publication.

object_properties.name: photoCredit
object_properties.label: Photo Credit
object_properties.description: Indicates the organization responsible for providing photo credit.

object_properties.name: returningToRootsOf
object_properties.label: Returning to Roots Of
object_properties.description: Indicates a person returning to their original organization or affiliation.

object_properties.name: partOf
object_properties.label: Part Of
object_properties.description: Indicates that one organization is a component or division of a larger organization.

object_properties.name: parentOrganizationOf
object_properties.label: Parent Organization Of
object_properties.description: Indicates the parent organization of a subsidiary or related organization.

object_properties.name: worksFor
object_properties.label: Works For
object_properties.description: Indicates the organization for which a person is employed.

object_properties.name: globalProductManagerFor
object_properties.label: Global Product Manager For
object_properties.description: Indicates a person's role as a global product manager for a specific product.

object_properties.name: organizerOf
object_properties.label: Organizer Of
object_properties.description: Indicates a person who has organized an event.

object_properties.name: startedCareerAt
object_properties.label: Started Career At
object_properties.description: Indicates the organization where a person began their professional career.

object_properties.name: hasDepartment
object_properties.label: Has Department
object_properties.description: Indicates that an organization has a specific department.

object_properties.name: hasProduct
object_properties.label: Has Product
object_properties.description: Indicates that an organization offers or has a specific product.

object_properties.name: speakerAt
object_properties.label: Speaker At
object_properties.description: Indicates a person who has spoken at an event.

object_properties.name: authored
object_properties.label: Authored
object_properties.description: Indicates a person who has authored a specific publication.

object_properties.name: publishes
object_properties.label: Publishes
object_properties.description: Indicates an organization that publishes a specific publication.
